chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1381 of 2023 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection at flag `A` 2. For hearing of main case 22-05-2024 Mr. Sikander Sadar Siddiqui, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Ahmed Ali Shahani, Assistant Advocate General a/w Zahid Ali, Focal person Town Officer Kotdiji.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- O R D E R Muhammad Iqbal Kalhoro,J:- Mr. Manzoor Hussain Halepoto Advocate files vakalatnama and comments on behalf of respondents No.3 to 5. Petitioner has filed this petition claiming difference bill from December 2016 to 2022 when he was serving as junior clerk in Town Committee Kotdiji. Focal person of Town Committee Kotdiji has come, submits that the documents submitted by the petitioner to base his claim are fake and has not been issued by the Town Committee Kotdiji. He further submits that no deduction from his salary was ever made. In view of above dispute over facts of the case this petition is dismissed. However, Circle Officer Anti-corruption Khairpur is directed to verify documents submitted by the petitioner from page 9 to 23 of this file, and if they are found fake, take action against them in accordance with law under intimation to this court. A copy of this order along with aforesaid documents be provided to learned AAG for a perusal and compliance. JUDGE JUDGE Sulemen Khan/PA
